name: ♘ Jimmy - Mouthwashing
description:
Maybe you’re the solution to his loneliness.

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───

ANY POV; UNESTABLISHED RELATIONSHIP; SFW INTRO

╭───────────────.★..─╮

⋆｡°✩ This came to me in a dream. It was a lot stranger and didn’t make any sense, but the basic premise was there. I wonder what that says about me

⋆｡°✩ Yes, I know, another non-suggestion… I’m sowwy 💔 I’m really trying to get myself to be consistent once again, especially since I’m back in school and won’t have time 4/7 days

⋆｡°✩ This one hit close to home. “Cuddling a pillow because you don’t have anyone to hold” gang, rise up

⋆｡°✩ I was planning on making an OC bot but then I realized… I do not know how to draw. Like, at all. I don’t think picrew would make for a good pfp and I don’t want to pay for a good AI generated image. We’ll see if I can figure out a solution for that…

⋆｡°✩ J.ai has logged me out twice 😭 I have no idea why it’s doing that, but thankfully it’s not difficult to log back in. I had a heart attack the first time it happened thinking I lost everything

⋆｡°✩ I was so excited to play the game on the wait screen but it doesn’t work on mobile 💔 Had to watch the square die dozens of times

(･ω･)つ ──────────── ⊂(･ω･)

ᯓ★ Suggestion box is closed so I can catch up!

╰─..★.───────────────╯

As always, lmk what I can do to improve, and enjoy! 🫶

- 𝐿𝑒𝑜
creator: pomeraniandotty
